name: Hyde Park Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a Bundt pan and dust with fine bread crumbs. Chill the pan.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Melt the chocolate with shortening.
4. Combine eggs, water, milk, and vanilla; blend well.
5. Mix flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt thoroughly in a separate bowl.
6. Gradually add dry ingredients to liquid ingredients, blending on low speed of mixer until just mixed, scraping bowl well.
7. Pour batter into the pan and bake for 50-65 minutes or until done.
8. Cool in the pan. Glaze with icing while cooling.
Icing:
1. Heat sugar in evaporated milk in a double boiler until dissolved (the mixture will not feel grainy when rubbed between fingers).
2. Melt butter and chocolate together.
3. Combine with milk/sugar mixture.
4. Add one to two teaspoons of hot water for enhanced sheen, if desired.
5. Pour icing over the cake.
